Tian Yi (з”°е„Җ). Went to attend to Dong ZhuoвҖҷs corpse. Executed by LГј Bu. Tian Yi was affiliated with Dong Zhuo. Tian Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
